title: eriolaena sphaerocarpa
intro: Eriolaena sphaerocarpa is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Madagascar, where the plant's tuberous root is used for its medicinal properties. The root of Eriolaena sphaerocarpa is reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, pain, and digestive issues. The plant is traditionally prepared as a decoction or powder, and is used in herbal medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
